# ProgressCircle

A circular progress indicator for displaying completion status in a ring/donut format.

## Import

```jsx
import {
  ProgressCircle,
  ProgressCircleRing,
  ProgressCircleTrack,
  ProgressCircleRange,
  ProgressCircleValueText,
  ProgressCircleLabel,
  ProgressCircleCircle,
} from "@onlinesales-ai/ui";
```

## Sub-components

| Component | Description |
| --- | --- |
| `ProgressCircle` | The root component that manages progress state. |
| `ProgressCircleTrack` | The background track of the circular progress. |
| `ProgressCircleRange` | The filled portion of the circular progress. |
| `ProgressCircleRing` | A convenience component that renders both track and range. |
| `ProgressCircleValueText` | Displays the current progress value as text in the center. |
| `ProgressCircleLabel` | A text label for the progress circle. |
| `ProgressCircleCircle` | The circle SVG element (also aliased as `ProgressCircleRing`). |

## Props

### ProgressCircle

| Prop | Type | Default | Description |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `value` | `number` | `0` | The current progress value. |
| `min` | `number` | `0` | The minimum value. |
| `max` | `number` | `100` | The maximum value. |
| `colorPalette` | `string` | `"blue"` | The color palette for the progress ring. |
| `size` | `string` | `"md"` | The size of the circular progress. |

## Usage

### Basic Circular Progress

```jsx
<ProgressCircle value={65}>
  <ProgressCircleRing />
</ProgressCircle>
```

### With Value Text

```jsx
<ProgressCircle value={75} colorPalette="green">
  <ProgressCircleRing />
  <ProgressCircleValueText />
</ProgressCircle>
```

### Custom Track and Range

```jsx
<ProgressCircle value={40} size="lg">
  <ProgressCircleTrack />
  <ProgressCircleRange />
  <ProgressCircleValueText />
</ProgressCircle>
```

### With Label

```jsx
<ProgressCircle value={50} colorPalette="blue">
  <ProgressCircleLabel>Upload Progress</ProgressCircleLabel>
  <ProgressCircleCircle />
  <ProgressCircleValueText />
</ProgressCircle>
```

### Indeterminate (Loading)

```jsx
<ProgressCircle value={null}>
  <ProgressCircleRing />
</ProgressCircle>
```
